PORTFOLIO
Working with the most unique and talented founders.
Our Mission
Technology shapes behavior, behavior builds culture.
Behavioral pathways are initially defined by efficiency until they reach a tipping point of redefining culture.
At Memetic Digital, we envision a future where culture is built through disruptive technologies —our mission is to identify and accelerate this transformation.
Our Approach
With 10+ years experience of building and managing start-ups, we provide hands-on support from ideation to expansion.
More than capital. We provide strategic guidance, operational resources, and industry connections to help companies scale effectively and sustainably.
Portfolio
The projects listed include angel investments made by Memetic Digital principals
